response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches the provided lyrics reference for 'Anagura Gurashi' and 'Kororon' perfectly. 2. Applied instantaneous transitions for rapid-fire lyrics in 'Kororon' and included a visual event subtitle for the second song's title card.

虎狼来 (Kororon)
Lyrics, Music: Eve
サンタマリア 起死回生の一打を放ってくれ
subtitles.english: Santa Maria, fire a strike to bring me back to life

subtitles.original: 湿っぽいのはいらんな 爽快に派手にやって終い
subtitles.english: I don't need any dampness, just do it refreshingly and flashily

subtitles.original: その答えは自問自答の向こう側にあんだしょうがない
subtitles.english: That answer is on the other side of self-questioning, it can't be helped

subtitles.original: アンダーグラウンドな世界の中
井の中の蛙大会優勝者 未練たらたら
subtitles.english: Winner of the frog-in-the-well contest, still lingering

subtitles.original: SNSに夢中 自尊心なんてとうに無いなって
subtitles.english: Obsessed with SNS, self-esteem is long gone

subtitles.original: 愛を謳っては 愛されたことない未体験 応えよ
subtitles.english: Singing of love, an unexperienced feeling of never being loved, answer me

subtitles.original: 毎度退場生涯引退生活安泰で居たい
subtitles.english: Leaving every time, I want to live a peaceful life after retiring for good
